description: Content-free historical Hermes usage from the isolated shared ledger. Cost is deliberately unpublished. Input includes cache tokens; reasoning is a subset of output and total.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Total tokens" FROM grafana.usage_all_time WHERE source_system = 'hermes' AND source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time);
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Usage records" FROM grafana.usage_all_time WHERE source_system = 'hermes' AND source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)::bigint AS "Known users" FROM grafana.usage_all_time WHERE source_system = 'hermes' AND source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time);

panels.description: Input already includes cache read/write. Reasoning is a subset of output and total, so do not add these columns together.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(user_id, 'unknown') AS "User", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Records", COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Total tokens", COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Input tokens", COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Output tokens", COALESCE(SUM(cached_input_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Cache-read tokens", COALESCE(SUM(cache_write_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Cache-write tokens", COALESCE(SUM(reasoning_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Reasoning tokens" FROM grafana.usage_all_time WHERE source_system = 'hermes' AND source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY COALESCE(user_id, 'unknown') ORDER BY "Total tokens" DESC;

panels.title: Historical token breakdown by user

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(event_time, '1d'), COALESCE(user_id, 'unknown') AS metric, SUM(total_tokens)::bigint AS value FROM grafana.usage_all_time WHERE source_system = 'hermes' AND source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT source_instance AS "Instance", COALESCE(provider, 'unknown') AS "Provider", COALESCE(response_model, request_model, 'unknown') AS "Model", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Records", COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Total tokens" FROM grafana.usage_all_time WHERE source_system = 'hermes' AND source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY source_instance, COALESCE(provider, 'unknown'), COALESCE(response_model, request_model, 'unknown') ORDER BY "Total tokens" DESC;

panels.title: Historical usage by instance, provider, and model

title: Hermes users — history
